title: Interface (GSM v1)
description: A named I/O surface — a curated selection of Receptors and Effectors grouped into a coherent, addressable contact point on a Component. Interface is purely structural: a named group of I/O ports declaring exposure.

receptors.description: Receptors exposed by this I/O surface.

effectors.description: Effectors exposed by this I/O surface.

channels.description: Channels whose Interactions reference Effectors/Receptors exposed by this Interface: interfaceChannels(I) = { C ∈ Channel | ∃ interaction ∈ C.interactions : I.exposes(interaction.effector) OR I.exposes(interaction.receptor) }.
